message:
fix(api): add input validation and tests for issue creation

- Add validation to reject newlines and control characters in issue title
- Add validation to reject null characters in issue description
- Add tests for /api/crew endpoint
- Add tests for /api/ready endpoint
- Add tests for /api/issues/create input validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
